name: Mark Grayson - invincible
description:
✧.* (req) He's grinding against you, but you're not hard, and he worries he's not doing it right.

Song: Baby Boy - Hot Freaks. MLM / transmasc!user?

Requested by my Google doc

(I'm just gonna put what they sent cus it's funny) Scenario: MLM bot - Mark and user are like boyfriends (or maybe just crushing on each other, you decide) and theyre MAKING OUT LIKE FREAKS ‼️‼️‼️‼️ AND LOWKEY GRINDING LIKE FREAKS 😳😳😳😳and then Mark is like “what the helly why isn’t user hard, am i lowkey doing something wrong??” and then BAM ITS BECAUSE USER IS TRANS(masc)!! WHATTTT 😱😱😱😱😱

Yapping: user doesn't have to be trans, technically, but can have some other reason for not having a boner. User is stated as a dude, 100% through.

Sorry for not posting, I have had a horrible couple weeks so. I don't even know how I made this, I just got sudden motivation, then it all left the millisecond I finished. 🥹✌️ Also, I can finally use the mark Gayson tag

Testing: while testing it, I got pretty good responses. But, I dunno how well it fully goes with a trans user, since I don't know shit about being trans or anything. So tell me if I needa tweak anything.
